channel.title: Docs update: 06 September 2019 - Learning Frontity guide
channel.description:
We've added more pages to [Learning Frontity](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/project) (and new info to the existing ones) to make it easier to master Frontity 🎓:
* [Project](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/project) - We've added an introductory page with the basics of how Frontity works and a common project structure. * [Styles](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/styles) - New page with the info necessary to style your theme with Frontity. * [Code Splitting](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/code-splitting) - Info about how to split your code with Frontity in order to improve the performance of your app. * [Head](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/head) - How to add tags like `<title>`, `<meta>`, or others to your `<head>` section.
We've also added new info to the existing pages such as [Libraries](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/libraries) or [Namespaces](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/namespaces). If you are interested, we recommend you to take a look at the whole Learning Frontity section.
We're planning to release soon new pages into this section explaining how Router and Source work.

item.title: Docs update: 06 September 2019 - Learning Frontity guide
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
We’ve added more pages to Learning Frontity (and new info to the existing ones) to make it easier to master Frontity :

  • Project - We’ve added an introductory page with the basics of how Frontity works and a common project structure.
  • Styles - New page with the info necessary to style your theme with Frontity.
  • Code Splitting - Info about how to split your code with Frontity in order to improve the performance of your app.
  • Head - How to add tags like <title>, <meta>, or others to your <head> section.

We’ve also added new info to the existing pages such as Libraries or Namespaces. If you are interested, we recommend you to take a look at the whole Learning Frontity section.

We’re planning to release soon new pages into this section explaining how Router and Source work.

Read full topic
item.source: Docs update: 06 September 2019 - Learning Frontity guide
